title: Minecraft: Dark and Stark
description: A vanilla-style mod that makes Minecraft fell more alive, yet dead at the same time.
body: Have you ever wanted to elevate your Minecraft experience? Well, look no further than Minecraft: Dark and Stark! Minecraft D&S aims to add vanilla-styled blocks, creatures, biomes, and items in just a few clicks. With this update-sized mod, you'll find the ying yang of horror and cute, like the Monosect and Hatghoul in the dimly lit Monochrome forest! However, if you're not into that, drink ramen noodles while exploring the new cave generation. Decorate your home with new Grimstone tiles and mosaics for other planks. With these new touches to Minecraft 1.20.1, I hope that you find joy in this mod! Ojha-out, download in(coming.)
